title: Build procedural vertical city generator in Unity
summary: Top-level coordination intent for building the semantic graph, blockout, and Intentspace-aware tooling for the vertical city generator.
goal: Coordinate the remaining work needed to turn the current prototype into a coherent multi-agent procedural city generator in Unity.
outputs: A validation pass with concrete repair outputs
A working Intentspace coordination loop for the Unity project
doneCondition: The generator produces a coherent vertical city graph from a seed.
The blockout is navigable and legible in Scene view.
Major systems can be coordinated through Intentspace contracts and artifact references.

children.title: Stabilize canon and seed contract
children.summary: Lock the core fiction, seed values, and generator assumptions for The Ascending Ward.
children.goal: Make the canon and seed stable enough that generator modules have a shared target.
doneCondition: Canon and seed use consistent band names, landmarks, and purpose layers.
The seed can drive the current foundation agents without placeholder contradictions.

children.title: Implement semantic graph middle pass
children.summary: Add the missing graph agents that turn bands into districts, flows, and routes.
children.goal: Expand the current foundation pass into a real semantic city graph with infrastructure, districts, and circulation.
doneCondition: The generator produces infrastructure dependencies for major bands.
The generator produces district nodes with access levels and identities.
The generator produces public, hidden, and restricted routes.

children.title: Implement InfrastructureAgent v1
children.goal: Generate support flows for water, waste, power, maintenance, and medical logistics.
doneCondition: Each major band has required support services.
Public spaces have nearby service infrastructure.
Restricted spaces have hidden logistics routes.

children.title: Implement GovernanceAgent v1
children.goal: Map factions, control zones, social hierarchy, and surveillance gradients into the city graph.
doneCondition: Major districts have controlling powers or tensions.
Access levels reflect governance decisions.
The generator can explain who benefits and who is constrained.

children.title: Implement DistrictAgent v1
children.goal: Convert bands and sectors into connected district nodes with clear identities.
doneCondition: Each generated district has function, access, motifs, and dependencies.
Districts reflect the city's mixed taxonomy.
Districts are represented as graph nodes, not decorative labels.

children.title: Implement CirculationAgent v1
children.goal: Generate the public, hidden, and restricted route networks that make the tower legible and traversable.
doneCondition: At least one major public vertical route exists.
At least one hidden vertical route exists.
Major bands connect upward and downward.
Landmarks support player orientation.

children.title: Implement local layout and room synthesis
children.summary: Build walkable local spaces, anchor points, and room clusters from district identities.
children.goal: Turn district-level graph outputs into local loops, room clusters, and placement anchors.
doneCondition: Districts expose main paths, side loops, and service nodes.
Room clusters can be generated from district tags.
Placement anchors exist for later blockout and prefab placement.

children.title: Expand blockout geometry pass
children.summary: Use the richer graph to generate district volumes, bridges, shafts, and local blockout spaces.
children.goal: Move beyond band shells into a readable city blockout that tracks the semantic graph.
outputs: Route bridges, shafts, stairs, and room markers
doneCondition: Generated geometry corresponds to district and route data.
The city is legible from a distance and navigable at the local level.
Debug volumes and labels remain available for inspection.

children.title: Add asset placement contract and validator
children.summary: Prepare the system for controlled prefab and asset placement without turning Intentspace into a mesh store.
children.goal: Define the schema and validation rules for placing real assets into generated spaces.
doneCondition: The system can describe what asset category is needed and where.
Placed assets can be checked for size, orientation, and clearance.
The Unity scene can accept curated prefabs against anchor points.

children.title: Operationalize Intentspace workflow in Unity
children.summary: Make the live Intentspace bridge usable as a daily coordination loop from inside the Editor.
children.goal: Turn imported work items into an actionable backlog and keep artifact exchange practical.
outputs: Adoptable work items with artifact traceability
nonGoals: Treating Unity as a network client at play time
doneCondition: The project backlog can be posted into Intentspace from a structured source.
Unity can import visible work items and bind them to local work.
Artifact paths and work-intent ids remain traceable.

children.title: Playtest and validate navigation coherence
children.summary: Stress the generator against navigation, infrastructure, and historical-layer checks.
children.goal: Make sure the generator produces cities that are coherent, traversable, and visibly layered.
doneCondition: Major districts are reachable.
Support services exist for residential and hospital spaces.
At least three historical layers are visible in the blockout or labels.
